title: ottelia muricata
intro: Ottelia muricata, also known as the duckweed or water wisteria, is a submerged aquatic plant native to tropical regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ottelia muricata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Traditionally, it is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
